ASTM NetRID Service Provider notification behavior

scenarios.astm.netrid.v22a.ServiceProviderNotificationBehavior

Resources

  • flights_data provided by zurich_flights_data in top-level resource pool
  • service_providers provided by netrid_service_providers_v22a in top-level resource pool
  • mock_uss provided by mock_uss_instance_dp in top-level resource pool
  • id_generator provided by id_generator in top-level resource pool
  • dss_pool provided by netrid_dss_instances_v22a in top-level resource pool
  • uss_identification provided by uss_identification in top-level resource pool
